window.logic: Day 1 = warm-up (no pitch). Day 2 = insight DM tied to their pain point. Day 3 = direct ASK with teardown or offer.

prospects.critical_issue: Real estate firms need sharper investor-facing content and brand trust.
prospects.prisy_offer: Brand authority refresh + investor pitch + content engine.
prospects.outreach_hook: Your expertise should look as strong online as it is in the room.

day_1.action: Engage on LinkedIn — comment thoughtfully on a recent Newton Properties post or update. No pitch.

day_2.action: DM: 'Ehab — Your expertise should look as strong online as it is in the room. I spotted one fixable thing — mind if I share it?'

day_3.action: Send 1-page teardown (attached) + ASK: 'Sales-heavy messaging can miss premium positioning and buyer confidence. Brand authority refresh + investor pitch + content engine. BHD 750/mo covers it. 20-min call this week?'
